title: Coverage report
description: A project owner generates a coverage report over the tree, listing what is unspecified and untested without reading every document.
iWant: a coverage report over the tree
soThat: I can see at a glance what is unspecified or untested without reading every document

acceptanceCriteria.description: Coverage lists every requirement that has no user story
acceptanceCriteria.then: it lists every requirement that has no user story

acceptanceCriteria.description: Coverage lists every acceptance criterion that has no test suite
acceptanceCriteria.then: it lists every acceptance criterion that has no test suite

acceptanceCriteria.description: A fully covered project reports complete coverage with no gaps
acceptanceCriteria.then: it reports complete coverage with no gaps
